title: US-Iran War Live: Trump Cancels Iran Strikes After 'High-Level Approval' Of Talks
summary_full: US-Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: Trump said key points of a potential agreement have been worked out with support from several countries, raising hopes of a deal soon.
